dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5944 IH: Restoring Inpatient Mental Health Access Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Finstad introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend title XIX of the Social Security Act to allow for Federal financial participation for services furnished to patients in an institution for mental diseases under the Medicaid program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Restoring Inpatient Mental Health Access Act of 2025.

section.header: Allowing for Federal financial participation for services furnished to patients in an institution for mental diseases under the Medicaid program

subsection.text: Section 1905(a) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1396d(a)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (1), by striking (other than services in an institution for mental diseases);
in paragraph (4)(A), by striking (other than services in an institution for mental diseases);
in paragraph (15), by striking (other than services in an institution for mental diseases); and
in the matter designated as subparagraph (B) following the last numbered paragraph of such subsection, by inserting furnished before January 1, 2027, after care or services.

subsection.text: Section 1915(l)(1) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1396n(l)(1)) is amended by inserting and before January 1, 2027, after October 1, 2019,.
The amendments made by this section shall apply with respect to medical assistance furnished on or after January 1, 2027.
